overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a nighttime walk through a Louisiana-style swamp. The player moves from grassy wetland onto a wooden boardwalk crossing dark water, with the lights of a distant town visible through the trees under stormy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: swampy grassland with scattered cypress trees

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward a wooden boardwalk structure in the distance

entered.detail: tall swamp cypress trees with spanish moss hanging from branches
warm yellow lights from buildings visible through the trees across the swamp
wet swamp grass covering the ground
elevated wooden walkway with railings crossing the swamp

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark swamp at night, with the camera moving through tall wet grass toward a wooden boardwalk. Cypress trees with hanging moss dot the landscape, while the warm lights of a distant town glow on the left horizon under heavy storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden boardwalk crossing over swamp water

events.description: steps from grassy ground onto wooden boardwalk structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden boardwalk over dark still water, moving toward the distant town lights

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence railing along the boardwalk edge
dark still water visible beneath and beside the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto an elevated wooden boardwalk crossing over dark swamp water. The wooden planks and railings create a narrow path forward, with the town lights now visible ahead through gaps in the trees. The water reflects the dim night sky as the crossing continues.

events.description: exits wooden boardwalk back onto grassy swamp ground

agents.ego_description: continuing through grassy terrain toward the illuminated town, passing large cypress trees

entered.detail: wet swamp grass and muddy patches returning to ground level

segments.scene_description: Leaving the boardwalk behind, the camera returns to walking through grassy swamp land. Large cypress trees pass by on the right as the path curves slightly, maintaining course toward the distant town lights that remain visible through the trees on the left horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, atmospheric swamp that transitions from wild wetlands across a structured boardwalk and back into the wilderness. It begins by moving through tall wet grass and moss-draped cypress trees, with the warm glow of a distant town shimmering on the left horizon under heavy storm clouds. As the camera advances, the terrain shifts onto an elevated wooden boardwalk, where the narrow path of planks and railings guides the movement over dark, reflective swamp water. The scene then opens back up as the camera leaves the boardwalk behind and returns to the grassy swamp land. Finally, the path curves slightly past large cypress trees on the right while maintaining a steady course toward the town lights still visible through the trees.
